overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting colorful neon signs, futuristic architecture, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past the CALIENTE tower and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
pedestrian standing near the shop entrance

entered.detail: tall building with large orange CALIENTE signage at the top
tall palm tree trunk along the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard with WILD text
storefront with bright green and orange neon lighting
vertical neon sign with softsys text
tall street lamp with horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a neon-lit city sidewalk at night, passing by the towering CALIENTE building on the left and various holographic advertisements. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the storefronts. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under yellow staircase with purple neon accents

events.description: passes under the yellow staircase structure into a covered walkway
purple neon lighting becomes visible in the underpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered area beneath the yellow staircase structure

entered.detail: large industrial staircase with yellow painted railings and supports
tunnel entrance illuminated with vibrant purple neon light
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street ahead
vertical array of red traffic lights on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath a massive yellow staircase structure. The environment shifts from open sky to a semi-enclosed space with purple neon lighting visible in the underpass ahead. The CALIENTE tower remains visible to the left while the overhead walkway becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with yellow crosswalk and futuristic glass buildings

events.description: turns right to begin crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right while crossing

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street between moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
modern building facade with cyan neon vertical lighting strips
illuminated street sign with red neon text

segments.scene_description: The character turns right to cross the wide intersection, stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk. A futuristic glass building with cyan neon accents dominates the right side of the frame while vehicles pass by. The overhead walkway shifts to the left as the character moves through the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with giant digital billboards and holographic advertisements

events.description: enters the open plaza area surrounded by towering digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza surrounded by massive holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza ahead

entered.detail: massive multi-story digital display showing advertisements on a gold-trimmed building
large concrete planter with palm trees and green neon lighting at the base
large red neon V-shaped sign on a distant building
tall dark rectangular pillars arranged in rows throughout the plaza
floating holographic displays with colorful product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast open plaza surrounded by towering buildings covered in giant digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The ground is paved with reflective tiles, and palm trees in illuminated planters dot the area. Sparse pedestrians walk through the plaza as the character moves toward the large neon V sign in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that transitions from a crowded sidewalk into a vast, open digital plaza. It begins with the character walking past the towering CALIENTE building and holographic advertisements, where wet pavement reflects the vibrant colors of the storefronts. As the character moves forward, the open sky is replaced by the semi-enclosed space of a covered walkway beneath a massive yellow staircase, shifting the lighting toward deep purple tones. The scene then opens up as the character turns right to cross a wide intersection, passing a cyan-accented glass building and moving across yellow-striped crosswalks. Finally, the environment expands into a sprawling plaza of reflective tiles and illuminated palm trees, surrounded by giant digital billboards and leading toward a large neon V sign in the distance.
